description.value: With this litany, you become more aware of your opponents. You can make two additional attacks of opportunity this round. Furthermore, you gain a +2 sacred bonus to AC against attacks of opportunity. While subject to this spell, the target cannot be the target of another spell that has the word “litany” in the title.
